name: Ducky One 3 AURA TKL Mechanical Keyboard - Cherry MX Silent Red Switches - Fully Hot-Swappable PCB - Double-Shot PBT Keycaps - Detachable USB Type-C Cable - Dual-layer PCB - RGB Backlit Keys (DKON2187ST-SUSPDABAAAC1)
